title: Founders Associate

must_haves.req: Degree in Business/Economics/Maths/highly-analytical field from a globally top-tier university
must_haves.note: Ryan has a 2:1 BA Business Management from Leeds — relevant field but not a globally top-tier institution.

must_haves.req: 1+ yr high-impact experience at elite consultancy / bulge-bracket IB / Big Tech / leading PE-VC fund / hyper-growth venture startup
must_haves.note: No consulting/IB/PE/Big Tech; DOES have early-employee experience at a venture-backed startup (Minima), which is one of the listed paths.

must_haves.req: Exceptional analytical skills; turn complex data into executive insight
must_haves.note: Operator/GTM analytical strength but not the quant/strategy-deck profile they screen for.

must_haves.req: Right-hand to CEO, fully autonomous strategy execution
must_haves.note: Directly proven via Founder's Associate role at Minima.
London is a listed location; UK-authorized.

met_strengths: venture-backed startup early-employee path (a listed qualifier)
one_line_verdict: Strong founder-associate behavioural fit, but the explicit top-tier-university + elite-firm pedigree bar is a hard screen Ryan's profile does not clear.
fetch_note: Full JD from api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/melotech (open; London among Berlin/NY/LA/SF locations, fully remote). Melotech = Cherry/Speedinvest/GFC-backed media-entertainment AI. Pedigree bar verified directly in the posting.
